english: Gigarg has our brothers and sisters running around like headless chickens, forging massive plates of iron and Deldrimor steel for his own armor.    He's getting on better than expected with the Flame Legion, already looking down on us like things to be bossed around. Has he forgotten who we are? How we suffered? Or does his heart beat with a newfound thirst for power over others? He and Vostya thrive, while many of us are left to clean up the messes left behind by their failed experiments.

Given the rising security threat and environmental instability on the isle, all villagers are required to report to the inn by nightfall.    Each individual may bring one personal effect so long as it fits on your person. The White Mantle will provide any other necessary supplies, such as food, bedding, and clothing. This is for storage purposes, as the inn was not built to house this many patrons.    We appreciate your patience. And remember that your longevity is assured by Saul's golden trail.

Gixx, you're free to send a couple of your hungry book eaters to Janthir. If you've got anyone familiar with titan history, best send them along too. Alliance will cover their research fees.     Councillor Ludo
